languages.text: "Я наш{mf|ел|ла} коконы из листьев, и в них... кажется, там человеческие тела".
"I found cocoons made out of leaves, and what appeared to be... human corpses inside."
languages.original_text: "Я наш{mf|ел|ла} коконы из листьев, и в них... кажется, там человеческие тела".

traits.locale_text: "I found cocoons made out of leaves, and what appeared to be... human corpses inside."
"I found cocoons made out of leaves, and what appeared to be... human corpses inside."
"I found cocoons made out of leaves, and what appeared to be... human corpses inside."
"I found cocoons made out of leaves, and what appeared to be... human corpses inside."

languages.text: « J'ai trouvé des cocons faits de feuilles qui contenaient ce qui ressemblait à... des cadavres humains. »
languages.original_text: "I found cocoons made out of leaves, and what appeared to be... human corpses inside."

traits.locale_text: « J'ai trouvé des cocons faits de feuilles qui contenaient ce qui ressemblait à... des cadavres humains. »

languages.text: «He encontrado unas crisálidas hechas de hojas que contenían... cadáveres humanos».
languages.original_text: "I found cocoons made out of leaves, and what appeared to be... human corpses inside."

traits.locale_text: «He encontrado unas crisálidas hechas de hojas que contenían... cadáveres humanos».

languages.text: “我发现了一些用树叶制成的茧，里面似乎是……人类的尸体。”
languages.original_text: "I found cocoons made out of leaves, and what appeared to be... human corpses inside."

traits.locale_text: “我发现了一些用树叶制成的茧，里面似乎是……人类的尸体。”

languages.text: "Ich habe Kokons aus Blättern gefunden, und im Inneren schienen ... menschliche Leichen zu sein."
languages.original_text: "I found cocoons made out of leaves, and what appeared to be... human corpses inside."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe Kokons aus Blättern gefunden, und im Inneren schienen ... menschliche Leichen zu sein."

languages.text: "Yapraklardan yapılmış kozalar ve içlerinde... İnsan cesetleri gibi görünen şeyler buldum."
languages.original_text: "I found cocoons made out of leaves, and what appeared to be... human corpses inside."

traits.locale_text: "Yapraklardan yapılmış kozalar ve içlerinde... İnsan cesetleri gibi görünen şeyler buldum."

languages.text: 「葉っぱでできた繭を見つけた。そして…人間の死体のようなものが入っていた」
languages.original_text: "I found cocoons made out of leaves, and what appeared to be... human corpses inside."
